summary: Verified EUR/BGN dual-currency display across Products, Cart, Checkout and Admin (Products + Orders) on https://kostin-cosmetics-1.preview.emergentagent.com using fixed rate 1 EUR = 1.95583 BGN. All four requested scenarios PASS. Conversion math validated programmatically on multiple samples (€129.00 -> 252.30 лв; €258.00 -> 504.60 лв; €68.32 -> 133.62 лв; €145.00 -> 283.60 лв; €85.00 -> 166.25 лв; €6.14 -> 12.01 лв; €69.02 -> 134.99 лв; €99.70 -> 195.00 лв) — all match formula.

ui_bugs.issue: Per-item line in the Order Summary panel shows only EUR (e.g. '€258.00'), no BGN equivalent. Subtotal, Total, Shipping and Discount rows DO show dual EUR/BGN, so it is an inconsistency, not a blocker. Code ref: /app/frontend/src/pages/Checkout.jsx line ~727: `€{(item.price * item.quantity).toFixed(2)}`
Checkout.jsx line ~502 displays only EUR ('€{orderSuccess.total.toFixed(2)}') in the success confirmation. For consistency with the rest of the app, this should also show the BGN equivalent.

action_items: (Optional, LOW priority) Update Checkout.jsx ~line 727 to render dual price for each order-summary item, e.g. use `formatDualPrice(item.price * item.quantity)` for consistency with admin/cart.
(Optional, LOW priority) Update Checkout success block (line ~502) to show '€X.XX / Y.YY лв.' instead of EUR-only.

Consider refactoring all hardcoded `1.95583` multipliers across Cart.jsx, Checkout.jsx, ProductCard.jsx, ProductDetail.jsx to use `formatDualPrice`/`getPriceDisplay` from utils/currency.js (DRY) — the helpers exist but aren't fully adopted yet.
Pre-existing (unrelated to this iteration): `ReferenceError: DUBAI_BRANDS is not defined` console error on every page load (carried over from iteration_8/9/10).
critical_code_review_comments: DRY violation: the constant 1.95583 is hardcoded directly in Cart.jsx (4x), Checkout.jsx (5x), ProductCard.jsx (1x), ProductDetail.jsx (1x). currency.js already exports `EUR_TO_BGN_RATE`, `formatDualPrice`, `formatBgn`, `getPriceDisplay`. ProductCard imports `formatDualPrice` but still does the multiplication inline (line 70-71) — unused import suggests an incomplete migration.
Currency helpers are well written (NaN-safe, default to 0). Good defensive code in /app/frontend/src/utils/currency.js.
Admin (ProductsManager.jsx, OrdersManager.jsx) correctly uses formatDualPrice — consistent and clean.
Recommendation: replace inline `* 1.95583` literals with calls to the helper to avoid future drift if the rate ever changes (it shouldn't post-Eurozone, but best practice).

success_rate.frontend: 100% on requested dual-currency scenarios (Products / Cart / Checkout / Admin Products / Admin Orders). 2 LOW-priority inconsistencies on Checkout per-item line and success message.

test_credentials: Admin: konstantin.kirchev.bs@gmail.com / aS1zX2QwE34xK9 (from /app/memory/test_credentials.md). Login flow worked, redirected to /, manual navigation to /admin succeeded.
seed_data_creation: Seeded localStorage key `kostin_cart` with [{id:'test-cart-1', name:'Test Perfume', brand:'KOSTIN', price:129.00, quantity:2, image, size:'100ml'}] to test Cart and Checkout dual-price math without going through full add-to-cart flow.
context_for_next_testing_agent: EUR/BGN dual-currency feature is fully working in all four requested places (Products grid via ProductCard, Cart, Checkout summary subtotal/total, Admin Products PRICE column, Admin Orders). Rate 1.95583 confirmed numerically. Only nits left: (a) Checkout per-item line shows EUR only, (b) Checkout success line shows EUR only, (c) DRY refactor opportunity to use helpers everywhere. Pre-existing DUBAI_BRANDS ReferenceError still in console (not related). Admin login via /auth works with seeded admin creds.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — this iteration was feature verification of the dual EUR/BGN price display, not bug RCA. Feature behaves as specified.
